_comment: Responder preset — for an autonomous AI bridge/responder session that should react to beam traffic without the user typing. Enables the proactive hooks: starts the notifier daemon on boot (watch_on_boot — which also feeds the wake-file doorbell, so true idle-wake is built in) and uses the Stop hook to surface/handle messages that arrive mid-turn (on_stop). Used by /beams:init --profile responder. See README 'Profiles' + 'Proactive delivery' sections.
